2026-03-26T19:11:53.240+01:00 INFO 2301615 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:h2:mem:testdb] Database driver: H2 JDBC Driver 100 Pool: DataSourceConnectionProvider Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown Hibernate: create global temporary table HTE_users(id integer, rn_ integer not null, fullname varchar(125), password varchar(125), role varchar(125), username varchar(125), primary key (rn_)) transactional 2026-03-26T19:11:53.306+01:00 INFO 2301615 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists bidlist cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists curvepoint cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists rating cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists rulename cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists trade cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: drop sequence if exists users_seq Hibernate: create sequence users_seq start with 1 increment by 50 Hibernate: create table bidlist (ask numeric(12,2), ask_quantity numeric(12,2), bid numeric(12,2), bid_list_id integer generated by default as identity, bid_quantity numeric(12,2), bid_list_date timestamp(6), creation_date timestamp(6), revision_date timestamp(6), status varchar(10), account varchar(30) not null, type varchar(30) not null, benchmark varchar(125), book varchar(125), commentary varchar(125), deal_name varchar(125), deal_type varchar(125), revision_name varchar(125), security varchar(125), side varchar(125), source_list_id varchar(125), trader varchar(125), creation_name varchar(255), primary key (bid_list_id)) Hibernate: create table curvepoint (curve_id integer, curve_value numeric(12,2), id integer generated by default as identity, term numeric(12,2), as_of_date timestamp(6), creation_date timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table rating (id integer generated by default as identity, order_number integer, fitch_rating varchar(125), moodys_rating varchar(125), sandprating varchar(125), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table rulename (id integer generated by default as identity, description varchar(125) not null, json varchar(125) not null, name varchar(125) not null, sql_part varchar(125) not null, sql_str varchar(125) not null, template varchar(512) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table trade (buy_price numeric(12,2), buy_quantity numeric(12,2), sell_price numeric(12,2), sell_quantity numeric(12,2), trade_id integer generated by default as identity, creation_date timestamp(6), revision_date timestamp(6), trade_date timestamp(6), status varchar(10), account varchar(30) not null, type varchar(30) not null, benchmark varchar(125), book varchar(125), creation_name varchar(125), deal_name varchar(125), deal_type varchar(125), revision_name varchar(125), security varchar(125), side varchar(125), source_list_id varchar(125), trader varchar(125), primary key (trade_id)) Hibernate: create table users (id integer not null, fullname varchar(125) not null, password varchar(125) not null, role varchar(125) not null, username varchar(125) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-03-26T19:11:53.317+01:00 INFO 2301615 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-26T19:11:53.430+01:00 WARN 2301615 --- [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering.
